title: thelypteris supranitens
intro: Thelypteris supranitens, also known as the giant wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris supranitens include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to support lung health and immune function.
